title: Production URL shows localhost instead of ngrok URL
symptom: The production URL for n8n is displaying as 'localhost' instead of the expected ngrok URL, causing issues with external access.
root_cause: The issue arises when the n8n instance is not correctly configured to read the environment variables from the .env file, particularly the WEBHOOK_URL and WEBHOOK_TUNNEL_URL settings, which are essential for exposing the correct production URL.
fix_steps: Open the .env file located in your n8n directory.
Ensure that the WEBHOOK_URL is set to your ngrok URL, e.g., 'WEBHOOK_URL=https://thoroughly-macaw.ngrok-free.app'.
Restart the n8n container using 'docker compose up' to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Set the WEBHOOK_URL in your .env file to the ngrok URL and restart the n8n container.
